famous quote:
It is your character, and your character alone, that will make your life happy or unhappy. That is all that really passes for destiny and you choose it. No one else can give it to you or deny it to you."
-John McCain
User added:
"O Lord our God, you answered them. You were a forgiving God to them, but you punished them when they went wrong."
‭‭Psalms‬ ‭99:8‬ ‭NLT‬‬‬‬‬‬

God answers you! He sees you! I am constantly amazed that God knows me personally. Better than I know myself. Even though He knows all of my dark meanness, evil thoughts, callousness, and willfulness, because of Christ Jesus, He has forgiven me. And God loves me so much that He sends correction into my life to keep me on the right path. Do you see His loving hand in the correction He gives? Consider what forgiveness cost Him, and I think you will.

-Sean Lennon
Interview Text:
Hannah Noble:

(part 8)

Here is another dream she had: 
She has a fierce mother-in-law. Hannah had a dream while they were living in their house. The dream was about Hannah's mother-in-law's relationship with Jesus. In the dream her mother-in-law was purposely putting herself in death's doorway; "trying to die, basically." They were at her mother-in-law's old house and Hannah walked in on her laying in a funeral position in their bedroom. Fast forward in the dream, Hannah saw her in a Jeep. They were watching her from another car, as she was trying to drive this Jeep into on-coming traffic. Every time she tried, the Jeep just disappeared and came back to life, like rebirthing in a video game. 

When she woke up Hannah heard, "You are going to tell your mother-in-law this dream." Hannah said "Hell no! I don't even think I got the details right!" The Lord calmly and patiently said, "I didn't tell you to get all the details right. I told you to be faithful and obedient."

So she got the guts up and told her the dream. She looked at Hannah with her five foot zero frame. "Okay," She said. "I need you to write all of this down and to send it to me." Hannah said okay. A month to the day later a man came up to Hannah's mother-in-law and said, "I had a dream about you!" He told her and it was almost identical to Hannah's. This man had never been to their old house, but he described her old neighborhood and their old house, and he saw her on a 4-wheeler, doing dangerous jumps into the sunset. Hannah said, "The similarities were uncanny."
Music Video Instructions: Does this describe our constant pursuit of God?
